head: dense_fg_aux
hypothesis: E-40: dense_fg_aux 30ep canonical. E-39 proved dense foreground auxiliary supervision delivers +0.020 mIoU at 8ep (0.3096 vs E-28 0.2893), nearly matching E-31 30ep DIoU (0.3111) in 1/3.75 the epochs. Core question: does this gain persist at 30ep and exceed E-31? If best_val_mIoU >= 0.33, dense_fg becomes default training strategy. No new variables — same config as E-39, only epochs changed to 30.
